chief_complaint: Seven patients, aged 30-60 years, presented with profound sensorineural hearing loss.
history: All patients had a history of COVID-19 infection. They experienced severe acute respiratory symptoms, followed by sudden onset of hearing loss. Brief clinical histories and audiological tests were performed. The current condition of the patients was also considered.
exam: Vital signs were within normal limits. Physical examination revealed no abnormalities.
labs: Audiological tests showed profound sensorineural hearing loss. COVID-19 symptoms and clinical evaluation were consistent with COVID-19 infection.
correct_diagnosis: COVID-19 infection with sensorineural hearing loss
differentials: COVID-19 infection with sensorineural hearing loss
correct_ranking: COVID-19 infection with sensorineural hearing loss
